videos.title: Utah's Strangest Valley Hides a Forgotten Story
videos.description:
Valley of the Gods is what you get when you take Monument Valley and strip away the crowds, the entrance booth, and the parking lots 17 miles of dirt winding through towering sandstone buttes with names like Seven Sailors and Setting Hen. It's one of the most underrated drives in southern Utah. But I didn't come all the way out here for the scenery.

I came to finish a story. In my last video I followed the Hole in the Rock pioneers down one of the most brutal wagon routes in American history. T
